sections.one_line: Core project dials: charter stability, actor count, and long-term horizon
Maps Kernos artifacts to their roles, update rules, and ownership across the project lifecycle
Initial Kernos documentation map and frontmatter rules for specs, logs, notes, and status routing
Heuristics for spotting documentation drift, growth, and review triggers across specs, charter, and manifests
Natural-language member requests turned into persistent Gardener preferences and routing rules
Rules for spec-session preambles, decision logging, and commit-coupled manifest updates
Guidance on combining the software development canvas with related canvases
